hard.name: 教室冲突 (room conflict)
hard.triggerCondition: Two slots with same dayOfWeek + slotIndex + roomId, with overlapping week sets
hard.notes: Full score uses O(n^2) pairwise comparison; delta score uses O(n) per-other iteration. Both paths use the same hasWeekOverlap logic.

hard.name: 教师冲突 (teacher conflict)
hard.triggerCondition: Two slots with same teacherId at same dayOfWeek + slotIndex and overlapping weeks
hard.primaryKey: (slotA, slotB) at same day/idx with teacherId match
hard.notes: Null teacherId skips. teacherId can be null (e.g. 体育无教师 / 校外实训). Both paths null-check consistently.

hard.name: 班级冲突 (class conflict)
hard.triggerCondition: Two slots sharing a classGroupId at same dayOfWeek + slotIndex with overlapping weeks
hard.primaryKey: (slotA, slotB) at same day/idx with classGroupId match
hard.notes: Nested loop over taskClasses — correctly handles merged-class (合班) tasks.

hard.name: 容量超限 (capacity overflow)
hard.notes: delta uses ctx.roomById.get(roomId) to read both old and new room; falls back silently if either is missing (room=0 case skips implicitly).

hard.name: 教室不可用 (room unavailability)
hard.notes: isRoomAvailable returns false when room not in roomById. K22-F8 wrapper pre-populates room 0 as UNSCHEDULED to prevent HC5 from spuriously firing on room=0 cases in delta tests (documented as deltaHard=-1000 expectation).

hard.name: 林校教室限制 (non-automotive forbid Linxiao)
hard.triggerCondition: task is non-automotive / mixed / unknown per classGroup membership, placed in Linxiao room
hard.notes: A separate "HC6 锁定课程被移动" skeleton exists in the full-score loop but is not counted (intentional design: lock enforcement is via solver movability / lockedSlotIds).

soft.name: 跨楼栋连续课 (cross-building back-to-back)
soft.triggerCondition: Same day + |idx diff|=1 + different building + (same teacher OR shared class)
soft.primaryKey: per ordered pair (slotA, slotB) at adjacent idx same day
skipRules: neither same teacher nor shared class
soft.sharedHelper: getBuilding + inferBuilding (full and delta both call)
soft.notes: K22-A originally flagged SC1 delta missing as HIGH. K22-D added SC1 delta logic that mirrors full-score detection; A.2 now serves as regression guard.

soft.name: 同天多节 (same-day multi-session)
soft.triggerCondition: Same teachingTask with N>=2 slots on the same dayOfWeek
soft.notes: Penalty = -10 * (count - 1). Delta iterates task siblings (ctx.slotsByTask) and counts those at old.dayOfWeek / move.newDay. A.1 case confirms full = delta consistency.

soft.name: 极端时间 (extreme time slot)
soft.notes: Lightest soft constraint (penalty -1). Default snapshot includes 1 SC3 contribution.

soft.name: 跨校区通勤 (cross-campus commute)
soft.triggerCondition: Same teachingTask, same day, adjacent slotIndex, different Room.building
soft.primaryKey: per (slotA, slotB) at same day/idx adj with task match
soft.sharedHelper: inline (no shared helper, but symmetric logic in full + delta)
soft.notes: SC4 uses room.building only (no inferBuilding fallback). SC1 uses getBuilding fallback. Semantic difference is documented as LOW finding (K22-A-E-3, K22-E-D-1).

soft.name: 教师每日课时负载均衡 (teacher day balance)
soft.triggerCondition: For one teacher: total >= 3 weekday lessons AND (maxLoad - minLoad) > 2
soft.notes: Aggregate constraint: per teacher, build Map<day, count>, sum all, compute max - min. Delta uses excludeSlotId + overrideDay pattern (F4). Harness G uses 3rd-position originalAssignments to isolate MIN_PERT.

soft.name: 汽车专业优先林校 (automotive prefers Linxiao)
soft.triggerCondition: task is AUTOMOTIVE_ONLY per classGroup membership, placed in non-Linxiao room
soft.notes: Penalty -20 (medium). Companion to HC6. Both are evaluated by the same loop. Largest single soft penalty in current scale.

soft.name: 周末一般不排课 (weekend avoidance)
soft.notes: Penalty -15 (heavy). Default snapshot does not trigger SC7. Delta uses old.dayOfWeek >= 6 / move.newDay >= 6 check.

soft.name: 班级空洞减少 (class gap reduction)
soft.triggerCondition: For one (classGroup, day) with N>=2 weekday lessons, sum of empty periods between adjacent lessons
soft.notes: Aggregate constraint. For merged-class (合班) tasks, each classGroup counts once. Delta uses excludeSlotId + overrideDay/overrideIdx (F6A component-isolation). Harness H uses 3rd-position originalAssignments to isolate MIN_PERT.

soft.name: 教室稳定性 (teaching task room stability)
soft.triggerCondition: For one teachingTask with N>=2 weekday slots, penalty per extra distinct room
soft.notes: Aggregate constraint. Penalty = -2 * (distinctRooms.size - 1). Task-level (not expanded to classGroup). Delta uses excludeSlotId + overrideDay/overrideRoomId (F8A component-isolation). Harness I uses 3rd-position originalAssignments to isolate MIN_PERT.

perturbation.name: 最小扰动 (minimum perturbation)
perturbation.triggerCondition: slot assignment differs from originalAssignments on day/idx/room
perturbation.notes: Delta compares old vs move against orig; full compares assignment vs orig. Both paths are correct. The 3rd-position originalAssignments trick in F4/F6/F8 harness isolates SC5/SC8/SC9 contribution by making MIN_PERT net 0.

sections.scope: Full / Delta consistency for SC1, SC2, SC3, SC4, MIN_PERT (core regression)
sections.notes: Compares calculateScoreWithDetails before/after against calculateDeltaScore. A.1 (SC2), A.2 (SC1 regression guard fixed in K22-D), etc. No 3rd-position originalAssignments; A.2 deliberately tests SC1 + MIN_PERT joint effect.
Each hard constraint verified against baseline state with no soft noise. Validates full + delta consistency for HC1-HC5.
Asserts hardScore=0, softScore=-11, breakdown SC2=1 / SC3=1. Snapshot is also written to docs/k22-score-default-snapshot.json.
Runs solve() with a fixed seed and asserts bestScore is non-decreasing and consistent across runs.
Smoke-checks the SchedulingConfig flow used by K21-FIX-F/G. Not score-related; included for chain stability.

sections.scope: Specialty campus weekend constraints (HC6 / SC6 / SC7)
sections.notes: K22-F3 brought up HC6 / SC6 / SC7. Harness F asserts each constraint with isolated fixtures (Linxiao keyword, automotive keyword, weekend day). 3rd-position originalAssignments used in delta cases.
6 full cases (G1-G6) covering 1,1,1,1 / 1,1,1,2 / 1,1,2,2 / 1,2 / 1,2,3 / 1,1,2 distributions. 3 delta cases (G7-G9) with 3rd-position originalAssignments isolating MIN_PERT.

sections.scope: SC8 class gap reduction (K22-F6 / F6A isolated)
sections.notes: 8 full + 4 delta. F6A isolation: teacherId=null (SC5 skip), 1 slot per task (SC2 skip), periods < 5 except where SC3 contributes (H4, H6, H8). Component-level assertion: each case asserts BOTH total soft AND SC8 details count + sum. 3rd-position originalAssignments isolates MIN_PERT.

7 full + 4 delta. F8A isolation: teacherId=null, single task with multiple slots, weekday-only for delta, 3rd-position originalAssignments, room 0 pre-populated as UNSCHEDULED to prevent spurious HC5. Component-level assertion: each case asserts BOTH total soft AND SC9 details count + sum.

harnessSummary.canonical: 60 PASS / 0 KNOWN_FAIL / 0 FAIL / 0 INFO (per F8 commit ceb9bc7)
harnessSummary.note: Sum of per-section approximations may exceed 60 because some A/B inner cases are conditional. The canonical 60 is the trusted baseline.

notes: Hard penalties: HC and HC6 both at -1000 (uniform).
Soft penalties range from -1 (SC3) to -20 (SC6). Largest ratio: SC6 / SC3 = 20x.
SC8 and SC9 both at -2 (per-gap and per-extra-room respectively).
MIN_PERT at -2 (lightest tied with SC8/SC9 base units).
No weighted aggregation; all penalties are fixed.

remainingRoadmap.name: 实训课 / 机房课匹配 (lab / practice room matching)
remainingRoadmap.rationale: Room.type is NORMAL for all 53 rooms; Course has no type field. Python parser detects 实训/实验/机房/上机 via regex but result is not persisted. Implement only after audit confirms keyword accuracy and a backfill strategy.

remainingRoadmap.name: 大班优先大教室 (large class priority for large room)
remainingRoadmap.rationale: getTaskStudentCount + Room.capacity are both available. Penalty could be proportional to (studentCount - room.capacity) when negative. Implementation straightforward; competition with HC4 (capacity hard) needs careful negative-padding design.

remainingRoadmap.name: 同班连续课少切换 (same-class consecutive switch reduction)
remainingRoadmap.rationale: Likely already partially covered by SC8 (class gap) and SC4 (cross-campus). Need a focused audit to confirm whether a separate constraint adds value or duplicates existing signal. Do not implement without audit.

remainingRoadmap.name: 教师半天集中 (teacher half-day concentration)
remainingRoadmap.rationale: Related to SC5 (teacher day balance). Penalty could prefer contiguous periods (e.g. morning periods 1-2 + 3-4 close) over spread. Data ready; complexity LOW. Should be audited before implementation to confirm no conflict with SC5.

remainingRoadmap.name: 教师午休 / 晚课偏好 (teacher time-slot preference)
remainingRoadmap.rationale: Requires TeacherPreference model. New schema + admin UI + import flow. HARD planning stage recommended before implementation.

remainingRoadmap.name: 周一早课 / 周五晚课偏好 (campus-wide time-slot preference)
remainingRoadmap.rationale: Requires SchedulingConfig.preferences JSON column. Low migration cost; planning needed for JSON shape and admin UI.

remainingRoadmap.name: 行政班固定教室 (class home room)
remainingRoadmap.rationale: Requires ClassGroup.homeRoomId Int? (FK to Room). Migration + admin UI update. Penalty -3 per off-home recommended in K22-E.

dataQualityDependencies.currentState: All 53 rooms have type=NORMAL. Room.type is in schema but admin form does not expose it.
dataQualityDependencies.downstreamBlocker: NEW-SC-04 (lab matching) cannot determine specialty vs NORMAL rooms.

dataQualityDependencies.currentState: Most rooms have building=null. inferBuilding(name) provides fallback for SC1 only; SC4 does not use fallback.
dataQualityDependencies.downstreamBlocker: SC4 trigger rate is artificially low. Cross-campus detection only fires when building is explicitly set.

dataQualityDependencies.currentState: Course model has no structured type field. Python parser has 实训/实验/机房/上机 regex but result is not persisted.
dataQualityDependencies.downstreamBlocker: NEW-SC-04 cannot distinguish theory vs practice vs lab courses at score time.

dataQualityDependencies.currentState: Detection is purely by name/building keyword. classGroup.name contains 汽车/车辆/新能源/智能网联/汽修; room.name contains 林校.
dataQualityDependencies.downstreamBlocker: If 教务处 renames a classGroup or moves a room, classification silently breaks.
dataQualityDependencies.recommendedStage: Future: add structured fields (ClassGroup.specialty enum, Room.campus enum) when schema migration happens.

dataQualityDependencies.currentState: Teacher has only name/phone/email. No time-slot preference field.
dataQualityDependencies.downstreamBlocker: NEW-SC-08 (teacher preference) cannot be implemented without schema work.
NEW-SC-10 (home room preference) cannot be implemented without schema work.

findings.title: K22-C Harness A-I is at 60 PASS / 0 KNOWN_FAIL / 0 FAIL / 0 INFO (per F8 commit)
findings.currentStatus: K22-C has 9 sections: A (full/delta consistency), B (HC invariant), C (snapshot), D (solver smoke), E (K21 config), F (HC6/SC6/SC7), G (SC5), H (SC8), I (SC9). F8 added 11 I cases. Total 60 cases, all PASS. No new cases in F9.
findings.risk: If K22-C is not 60/0/0/0 in a fresh re-run, indicates regression since F8. F9 is read-only; this finding flags the expected baseline.
findings.recommendation: Re-run npx tsx scripts/verify-score-regression-harness-k22-c.ts in any CI gate; treat any deviation as HIGH / BLOCKING.

findings.title: Default snapshot is stable: hardScore=0 / softScore=-11 / SC2=1 / SC3=1
findings.currentStatus: After F8 (SC9 implementation), default snapshot is unchanged from F6A. The 4-slot fixture has no teachingTask with multiple distinct rooms in [1..5], so SC9 does not fire. SC5 / SC6 / SC7 / SC8 also do not fire (insufficient data in fixture).
evidence: Default fixture: 3 rooms (A/B/C), 3 tasks, 4 slots. No task with 2+ weekday slots in 2+ rooms.
findings.risk: No risk. Snapshot is the canonical regression anchor.
findings.recommendation: Continue using this snapshot as the regression anchor in K22-C Harness C.

findings.title: All 6 new constraints (SC5, SC6, SC7, SC8, SC9, HC6) are covered by K22-C Harness A-I
findings.currentStatus: SC5 → G, SC8 → H, SC9 → I, SC6/SC7/HC6 → F. SC1 → A.2 (regression guard), SC2 → A.1, SC3 → A, SC4 → A. HC1-HC5 → B. MIN_PERT → A.2 net effect.
findings.risk: If a future constraint is added without harness coverage, regression risk is high. F9 does not block; F-stage spec must require harness integration.
findings.recommendation: Maintain the rule: any new constraint must add a Harness letter or extend an existing one. Enforce via review checklist.

findings.title: SC5 / SC8 / SC9 use affected-key local computation in delta path
findings.currentStatus: SC5: 1 key per teacher. SC8: ≤ 2 * taskClasses.length keys per (cgId, day). SC9: 1 key per teachingTaskId. All three use excludeSlotId + override pattern (the F3/F4/F6/F8 helper pattern). Helpers (buildTeacherDailyCounts, buildClassDayPeriods, buildTaskRoomSet) are shared between full + delta, eliminating drift risk.
findings.risk: No full / delta drift risk detected. The same helper produces both full and delta values, so divergence would be a code bug, not a design issue.
findings.recommendation: Continue the shared-helper pattern. For any future aggregate constraint, factor the key-aggregation logic into a single helper and reuse for both paths.

findings.title: SC1 uses getBuilding() fallback, SC4 only uses Room.building — LOW remains
findings.currentStatus: K22-A-E-3 / K22-E-D-1 LOW finding still present. SC1: getBuilding() with inferBuilding fallback. SC4: Room.building only. Semantics differ: SC1 detects cross-building back-to-back; SC4 detects cross-campus commute.
evidence: score.ts:407-448: SC1 uses getBuilding(pRoom) and getBuilding(qRoom)
score.ts:480-500: SC4 uses pRoom.building and qRoom.building (no fallback)
findings.risk: When Room.building is null, SC1 may trigger while SC4 does not. This is a semantic difference, not a correctness bug, but causes asymmetry in score reporting.
findings.recommendation: Defer to soft-constraint refactor stage. Could unify via getBuilding() in SC4 as well. Not blocking.

findings.title: Penalty constants are still hardcoded — not yet on K22-WEIGHTS-ROADMAP
findings.currentStatus: K22-A-C-1 / K22-E-F-1 MEDIUM finding still present. All 11 penalty constants (HARD=-1000, SC1=-5, SC2=-10, SC3=-1, SC4=-5, MIN_PERT=-2, HC6=-1000, SC6=-20, SC7=-15, SC8=-2, SC9=-2) are hardcoded in score.ts:16-26. Not in SchedulingConfig. No dynamic weights yet.
evidence: prisma/schema.prisma: SchedulingConfig has no hardWeights / softWeights field
findings.risk: Different schools / semesters cannot tune penalty weights without code changes. Limits productization. Not a correctness bug.
findings.recommendation: Open stage: K22-WEIGHTS-ROADMAP (separate from F-series constraint additions). Scope: SchedulingConfig.hardWeights / softWeights JSON; score.ts refactor to accept dynamic weights; extend K22-C harness to assert weight-aware snapshot. NOT in F9 scope.

findings.title: P0 (SC5/SC8/SC9) + new business (HC6/SC6/SC7) all complete and stable
findings.currentStatus: 3 P0 soft constraints from K22-E are now implemented and tested: SC5 (F4), SC8 (F6), SC9 (F8). 3 specialty/campus/weekend constraints from K22-F3 are also complete: HC6, SC6, SC7. K22-C Harness A-I total 60/0/0/0. No P0 / new-business work remains in the soft-constraint space.
findings.recommendation: Mark K22-F (P0 soft constraints) series complete. Move to P1 / P2 / Weights roadmap.

findings.category: H. P1 candidates need audit before implementation
findings.title: 4 P1 soft constraints remain — none should be implemented without prior audit
findings.currentStatus: P1 candidates: NEW-SC-04 (lab matching, needs K22-G audit first), NEW-SC-05 (large class), NEW-SC-06 (same-class consecutive), NEW-SC-07 (teacher half-day). Per F9 spec, none should be implemented directly. F9 is read-only summary.
findings.risk: Implementing without audit risks: (a) duplicating existing constraint (SC5/SC8); (b) introducing data-quality issues (lab matching); (c) skewing penalty scale (large class).
findings.recommendation: If a next stage is opened, it should be K22-F10 P1-AUDIT (read-only): evaluate each of 4 P1 candidates for feasibility, overlap with existing constraints, and penalty scale impact. NO implementation in K22-F10.

findings.category: I. P2 candidates require schema work
findings.title: 3 P2 soft constraints need schema planning before implementation
findings.currentStatus: P2: NEW-SC-08 (TeacherPreference), NEW-SC-09 (SchedulingConfig.preferences JSON), NEW-SC-10 (ClassGroup.homeRoomId). All require schema work. K22-H-SCHEMA-PLAN (planning only) recommended as prerequisite.
findings.risk: Implementing without schema planning risks repeated migration / rollback. Not blocking but increases churn.
findings.recommendation: K22-H-SCHEMA-PLAN as prerequisite: enumerate required schema fields, admin UI changes, import flow changes, data backfill strategy. Output: plan doc only, no migration.

findings.title: Room.type / Course.type data quality blocks K22-G (lab matching)
findings.currentStatus: Room.type is in schema but not exposed in admin form; all 53 rooms are NORMAL. Course has no structured type field; Python parser has 实训/实验/机房/上机 regex but not persisted.
evidence: src/lib/admin-db/config.ts: getFormFields("room") returns [name, building, capacity] (no type)
scripts/parse_cell.py: has 实训/实验/机房/上机 regex (not persisted)
findings.risk: Without data-quality audit, K22-G cannot reliably distinguish theory from practice courses. Solver may misroute courses to wrong room types.
findings.recommendation: Open stage: K22-G-ROOM-TYPE-DATA-QUALITY-AUDIT (read-only). Outputs: regex accuracy stats, sample of misclassified courses, recommended backfill strategy, admin form change proposal.

reasonsForRecommendation: P0 / new-business constraints are complete (SC5, SC8, SC9, HC6, SC6, SC7) — 60/0/0/0 K22-C.
P1 candidates (4 items) all need a feasibility / overlap audit before implementation.
P2 candidates (3 items) all need schema planning (K22-H).
Penalty constants are still hardcoded; K22-WEIGHTS-ROADMAP is open but is a separate refactor stage.
Data quality (Room.type / Course.type) blocks K22-G (lab matching) until a read-only audit confirms the path.

recommendedNextStageOptions.scope: Read-only audit of Room.type / Course.type / 实训课 / 机房课 matching feasibility
recommendedNextStageOptions.rationale: K22-G (lab matching) requires data-quality baseline; F8 left this as the main open P1 path.

recommendedNextStageOptions.scope: Read-only audit of how hardWeights / softWeights could enter SchedulingConfig (no schema change yet)
recommendedNextStageOptions.rationale: Penalty constants are still hardcoded; F9-F-1 (MEDIUM) is unaddressed.

recommendedNextStageOptions.scope: Read-only feasibility / overlap audit of 4 P1 candidates (NEW-SC-04/05/06/07)
recommendedNextStageOptions.rationale: P1 candidates should not be implemented directly; an audit decides priority and overlap.

notes: K22-F9 is a read-only summary. No Prisma writes, no score.ts changes, no schema changes, no API / frontend / importer / parser / RBAC changes.
K22-F8 commit ceb9bc7 is the starting point; F9 verifies the post-F8 state and outlines the remaining roadmap.
60/0/0/0 K22-C summary is the canonical anchor; this audit does not re-run it but relies on the F8 commit summary as the trusted baseline.
Penalty scale observation: SC6 (-20) is the largest soft penalty, dominating teacher / class / building constraints. If a future stage tunes weights, SC6 should be the first candidate for review.
